sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الْفُحُوصَاتُ الطِّبِّيَّةُ الدَّوْرِيَّةُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي الْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْفَرْدِ وَسَلَامَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Redovni medicinski pregledi smatraju se kamenom temeljcem u očuvanju zdravlja i dobrobiti pojedinca.
sentences.translationEn: Regular medical check-ups are considered the cornerstone of maintaining an individual's health and safety.

sentences.arabic: فَهِيَ تُسَاعِدُ فِي الْكَشْفِ الْمُبَكِّرِ عَنِ الْأَمْرَاضِ قَبْلَ تَفَاقُمِهَا، مِمَّا يَزِيدُ مِنْ فُرَصِ الْعِلَاجِ النَّاجِحِ.
sentences.translation: Oni pomažu u ranom otkrivanju bolesti prije nego što se pogoršaju, što povećava šanse za uspješno liječenje.
sentences.translationEn: They help in the early detection of diseases before they worsen, which increases the chances of successful treatment.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا أَنَّ الِالْتِزَامَ بِالتَّطْعِيمَاتِ وَاتِّبَاعَ نَمَطِ حَيَاةٍ صِحِّيٍّ يُقَلِّلَانِ مِنِ احْتِمَالِيَّةِ الْإِصَابَةِ بِالْأَوْبِئَةِ الْمُعْدِيَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također, pridržavanje vakcinacije i praćenje zdravog načina života smanjuju vjerovatnoću zaraze zaraznim epidemijama.
sentences.translationEn: Additionally, adherence to vaccinations and following a healthy lifestyle reduce the likelihood of contracting infectious epidemics.

sentences.arabic: إنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الْوِقَايَةِ يُخَفِّفُ الْعِبْءَ عَنِ الْمُسْتَشْفَيَاتِ وَيَضْمَنُ حَيَاةً مَدِيدَةً خَالِيَةً مِنَ الْأَوْجَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Investiranje u prevenciju smanjuje teret na bolnice i osigurava dug život bez bolova.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in prevention lightens the burden on hospitals and ensures a long life free from pain.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُجْتَمَعِ نَشْرُ الْوَعْيِ حَوْلَ أَهَمِّيَّةِ الرِّعَايَةِ الِاسْتِبَاقِيَّةِ لِتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga, društvo mora širiti svijest o važnosti proaktivne njege kako bi se poboljšao kvalitet života.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, society must spread awareness about the importance of proactive care to improve the quality of life.
